1.Along with the improvements in biochemical technology, the Infected got a visual makeover and awakened untapped power! The powerful battlefield skills “Mind Blast” and “Psionic Shield” will help you win on the battlefield!
2.Infected don't need to be healed. "Z Serum" can be converted into Nutrients. Higher qualities can convert even more.

title: Diablo Immortal
notes:
You don’t fight Hell — you command it. Bloodied Jewel unleashes new horrors in Lut Gholein, featuring new story content, 3 Helliquary bosses, and Ancient Legendary gear worth killing for. 

HELL OBEYS ME! Harness forbidden infernal magic as the Warlock, summoning devastating fiends and sacrificing everything for absolute power.

Minor bug fixes and enhancements

title: Toy Blast
notes:
The update is ready to take off!

The farmer is asleep, and the chickens are making their move! With a clever flying machine and a dream of wheat farms, they're ready for their biggest adventure yet. Don't miss this egg-citing update!

Be sure to update to the latest version of Toy Blast for the newest content. Every 2 weeks, we bring you 50 NEW LEVELS!

Come and have fun!

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!
